title: A Study Group, Off the Books
prose: {{dada-professor}}'s lessons this year are — depending who you ask — either reassuringly theoretical or completely useless, and a quiet consensus builds that the syllabus alone won't be enough if any of you actually need to defend yourselves one day.

It starts small: a handful of students, an empty classroom after hours, someone who's read ahead teaching the rest what a real Stunning Spell looks like. Nobody puts a name to it. Everyone keeps coming back anyway.

choices.label: Keep showing up, week after week.
